text: Standing in this well-lit, open hallway before the glass doors, anticipation rises in me. The room beyond appears to beckon with bright colors, words, and objects arranged in purposeful chaos. As I move closer, the displays and their messages suggest thoughtful study and creative inquiry. The juxtaposition between sterile hallway and vibrant exhibit ignites a sense of curiosity—a quiet excitement to cross the threshold and uncover what R+D truly means here. I feel like a boundary-crosser, on the edge of understanding something new.
